payload.issue: No path isolation or sanitization on uploaded filenames
payload.evidence_span: upload_service.py: save_upload() accepts report.pdf.jpg when filename.endswith('.jpg'), then writes UPLOAD_ROOT / filename. settings.toml: audit_log_retention_days is empty.
payload.recommended_fix: Sanitize filenames to prevent directory traversal, e.g., by using os.path.basename and joining with a secure base path.

payload.issue: File type validation relies solely on extension, not on content magic bytes
payload.evidence_span: upload_service.py: save_upload() accepts report.pdf.jpg when filename.endswith('.jpg'), then writes UPLOAD_ROOT / filename. settings.toml: audit_log_retention_days is empty.
payload.recommended_fix: Validate file type by reading magic bytes (e.g., using python-magic) instead of relying solely on extension.

payload.issue: Audit log retention configuration is missing or empty
payload.evidence_span: upload_service.py: save_upload() accepts report.pdf.jpg when filename.endswith('.jpg'), then writes UPLOAD_ROOT / filename. settings.toml: audit_log_retention_days is empty.
payload.recommended_fix: Set a default value for audit_log_retention_days in settings.toml and enforce it in the code.
